g.text: rec:# Prologue addi $sp, $sp, -8 # allocate space for $ra, $a0, $s0 sw $ra, 4($sp) # save $ra at the top of stack # Body bne $a0, $0, calc_rec # if n == 0 goto base and $v0, $0, $0 # $v0 = 0, return value addi $t0, $0, 1 # get ready to turn on the first index of a la $t1, a sw $t0, 0($t1) # turn on said index - a[0] = 1; j rec_done # calculate rec(n - 1, a) calc_rec: sw $a0, 0($sp) # need $a0 after jal addi $a0, $a0, -1 # $a0 = n - 1 jal rec # Epilogue lw $ra, 4($sp) # load $ra lw $a0, 0($sp) # restore $a addi $sp, $sp, 8 # reduce the size of the stack
